TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Namisan, title = Namisan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Namisan} }

S.FORM: == Namisan == u sulit nu Hulam śčŅŚĹĆśē£ťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Namisan. u kasalumaluma' nu Namisan sa, 76 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 187 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 87 ku tademaw, pakalatu 47%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 100 ku tademaw, pakalatu 53%. u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u Pangcah a niyazu' u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 46%, Paywan(Paiwan) 1%. u pangca sa, u cidekay nu Taywan Incumin. tusa a bataan a mang ku tademaw. mueneng i Kalinku i Pusung atu i dadipasan nu bayu'an. satuuday a cidekay u Pangcah. u Sakizaya a tademaw izaw tu ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini, namabulaw i 1878 tayni milimek. siiluc tu tina niyazu'. nasulitan ni Liaw Socen. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin:
S.PHON: == namisan == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu namisan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu namisan sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, pajwan(paiwan) *%. u paŇč ¶a sa, u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan in ¶umin. tusa a bataan a maŇč ku tad…ômaw. mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺinku i pusuŇč atu i dadipasan nu baju Ē~ °an. satuudaj a ¶id…ôkaj u paŇč ¶ańß. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izaw tu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini, namabur~…ĺaw i **** tajni mir~…ĺim…ôk. siir~…ĺu ¶ tu tina nijazu Ē~ °. nasur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺiaw so ¶…ôn. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin:
S.FORM: == Namisan == u sulit nu Hulam śčŅŚĹĆśē£ťÉ®ŤźĹ u siwkay nu niyazu' i Hualien a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Namisan. u kasalumaluma' nu Namisan sa, 76 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 187 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 87 ku tademaw, pakalatu 47%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 100 ku tademaw, pakalatu 53%. u sausi nu cidekay a tademaw u Pangcah a niyazu' u kasabinacadan, Pangcah(Amis) 46%, Paywan(Paiwan) 1%. u pangca sa, u cidekay nu Taywan Incumin. tusa a bataan a mang ku tademaw. mueneng i Kalinku i Pusung atu i dadipasan nu bayu'an. satuuday a cidekay u Pangcah. u Sakizaya a tademaw izaw tu ku Sakizaya a tademaw itini, namabulaw i 1878 tayni milimek. siiluc tu tina niyazu'. nasulitan ni Liaw Socen. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin:
S.PHON: == namisan == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam ***** u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i ńßuar~…ĺi…ôn a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu namisan. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu namisan sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u sausi nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw u paŇč ¶ańß a nijazu Ē~ ° u kasabina ¶adan, paŇč ¶ańß(amis) **%, pajwan(paiwan) *%. u paŇč ¶a sa, u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan in ¶umin. tusa a bataan a maŇč ku tad…ômaw. mu…ôn…ôŇč i kar~…ĺinku i pusuŇč atu i dadipasan nu baju Ē~ °an. satuudaj a ¶id…ôkaj u paŇč ¶ańß. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw izaw tu ku sakizaja a tad…ômaw itini, namabur~…ĺaw i **** tajni mir~…ĺim…ôk. siir~…ĺu ¶ tu tina nijazu Ē~ °. nasur~…ĺitan ni r~…ĺiaw so ¶…ôn. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin:
